bullets: Built an AI-integrated chatbot that processes receipt images via OCR, converts extracted data to JSON, and auto-records entries in Excel — eliminating manual data entry.
Implemented a live camera viewer using the Hikvision SDK to display and capture real-time streams.
Designing and developing 3 mobile games with Unity targeting iOS and Android.
Covering mechanics, UI systems, and full development lifecycle from concept to testing.
Developed KampYeri — a full-stack reservation platform for campsites, hotels, and caravan areas, including a business management system for dynamic listings.
Designed SQL schema, integrated data access with ASP.NET and LINQ, and built modules for user registration, business profiles, and an admin dashboard.
Built a responsive Bootstrap frontend and developed a standalone admin panel for a separate existing web application using C#, LINQ, and SQL.
